title: Zelensky under pressure to end row with Poland over WW2 name of army unit
summary_full: Poland is threatening to strip Ukraine's president of a state honour over the naming Ukrainian military unit after controversial World War Two fighters.
summary_public: Poland is threatening to strip Ukraine's president of a state honour over the naming Ukrainian military unit after controversial World War Two fighters.

PL.label: negative
